business.geography_hint: San Francisco / Los Angeles / Dallas, USA (11 locations)

engine.ladder_reasoning: A restaurant where the decision is made by browsing photos, the menu, and finding a nearby location with hours/directions — browsing the place IS the decision, which sits above quick-yes and thing on the ladder.

goal.one_action: Order online (or visit/call a nearby location)

structure.archetype_note: Multi-location restaurant marketing site wrapped around an owner.com ordering/rewards backend; nav also exposes Catering, Locations, Gift Cards, Hiring, Sign-in (not separately rendered).

unmapped.observed: Image gallery / A Visual Feast To Savour (two photo galleries)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Canonical section list has no gallery section id; galleries are a capability, not a section

unmapped.observed: Menu pages (Most ordered, Ramen, Extras, Rice, Soft Drink, Appetizer, Spicy, Merchandise — priced menu-lists with add-to-cart)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A priced, orderable restaurant menu is not a pricing tier grid nor a section id

unmapped.observed: HINODEYA Ramen Rewards loyalty program (Join Rewards -> login)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A points/loyalty rewards enrollment behind account login is not expressible as any canonical section

proposed_new.name: menu-ordering
proposed_new.evidence: Priced menu with modifiers/allergens, 'Order online' CTA opens a cart/checkout flow (dialogState=orderDetails, cart_or_checkout=true) powered by owner.com; distinct from storefront-checkout (goods/prints) — this is a food-ordering flow with delivery/takeout/dine-in options

proposed_new.name: loyalty-rewards
proposed_new.evidence: 'HINODEYA Ramen Rewards' points program with 'Join Rewards' CTA routing to account login — an ongoing rewards/membership loop, not a lead form, subscribe, or checkout

confidence.why: fetch_quality is 'rendered' (Cloudflare challenge blocked static fetch), and Catering/Locations subpages plus the owner.com ordering/rewards/login backend were not fully rendered — capped at medium per capture-quality rule

gap_findings: Restaurant online-ordering (menu -> cart -> checkout with delivery/takeout/dine-in) has no engine/section/capability today; delegated to owner.com but core to conversion

Multi-location chain (11 branches, each an expandable card with own address/hours/phone/order CTA) exceeds map-hours; closer to a per-location branch directory, not covered by practitioner-profiles (those are subpages)
Loyalty/rewards program enrollment (account-gated) is unrepresentable in the current goal mechanisms
Native mobile app download link ('Open the Hinodeya Ramen App') has no capability (store-badges is app-store badges, this is a direct download-app link)
